main.description: An activity log entry on a task — a progress comment, status transition, or assignee change. Can be linked to a Bluesky post when the user chooses to share their progress publicly.

task.description: AT-URI + CID of the task being updated.

newStatus.description: Set when this update includes a status transition. Omit for comment-only updates.

newAssignee.description: Set when this update changes the assignee. Omit if unchanged.

body.description: The update text — explains what changed, what was done, or what is blocked.

blueskyPostUri.description: AT-URI of the Bluesky post this update was shared to, if the user chose to post publicly. This post is eligible for token-weighted curation in the market feed.
